title: Supreme Court keeps Yatin Oza's contempt conviction in abeyance, asks HC to reconsider senior gown restoration afresh
description: The Supreme Court on Monday ordered that the contempt of court conviction handed down to Gujarat's veteran lawyer Yatin Oza by the Gujarat High Court shall remain in abeyance indefinitely. The Bench of Justices JK Maheshwari and AS Chandurkar also directed the High Court to take a fresh decision on restoring the Senior Advocate designation of Oza. "We request the High Court to take a first decision in respect of the incident of 2024 and the question of withdrawal of the senior designation in the
